movie.overview: In the late 19th century, two Swedish emigrants, Lasse Karlsson and his son Pelle, arrive on the Danish island of Bornholm hoping to find work on a farm and save enough money to travel to the United States of America.
movie.tagline: They thought the world would be theirs.
movie.title: Pelle the Conqueror

cast.name: Lars Simonsen
cast.character: Nils Køller - Father of Anna's Children
